creator: bugs-freebsd-org@bekreyev.ru
text:
Using FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2 as BRAS with mpd5-5.8 at VMware ESXi (HPE-ESXi-6.0.0-Update2-iso-600.9.5.0.48:
